---
name: onboarding-plan
description: Build a practical onboarding plan for a manager or engineer
agent: ask
---
Use the following files as context:

- [Team charter](../../knowledge/team-charter.md)
- [Operating model](../../knowledge/operating-model.md)
- [Engineering management core Space manifest](../../knowledge/space-manifests/engineering-management-core.md)
- [Onboarding Space manifest](../../knowledge/space-manifests/onboarding-space.md)

Create a phased onboarding plan in Markdown.

Include:
- first day
- first week
- first 30 days
- first 60 days
- first 90 days

For each phase, include:
- learning goals
- key documents / repos / Spaces
- people to meet
- decisions to understand
- quick wins
- suggested Copilot workflows to practice

Keep the plan realistic and role-specific.
